forbiddenModifications: Do not use Tailwind arbitrary values
Do not change hex colors to named colors
Do not simplify box-shadow values
Do not add CSS properties that are not in criticalSelectors or in elements[].styles (or element states)
Do not reorder children: follow contentOrder and elements[].children order exactly
Build exactly what is in the spec: structure, styles, and defaultContent from the JSON only; no inference, no additions, no "fixes"

icons.check: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" aria-hidden="true" data-slot="icon"> <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="m4.5 12.75 6 6 9-13.5"/> </svg>

defaultContent._rule: No default content defined; do not invent labels, icons, or copy. Use only what is in the spec or leave slots empty.

events.name: change
events.description: Native change when checked state toggles; use for form binding

state.name: checked
state.description: Controlled via checked prop or form value
